properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have a friend, a precious friend, Oh how He loves me He says His love will never end Oh how He loves me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, how He loves me x 2 I know not why I only cry Oh, how He loves me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Why He should come I cannot tell Oh, how He loves me, In my poor broken heart to dwell Oh, how He loves me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He died to save my soul from death, Oh, how He loves me, I will praise Him while He gives me breath Oh, how He loves me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He walks with me along life’s road, Oh, how He loves me He carries every heavy load, Oh, how He loves me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He has a home prepared for me, Oh, how He loves me, With Him I'll spend eternity Oh, how He loves me.
